question: What is the connection between the red clay pot and the rest of the image? Select from the following options: (A) It is the only red item in the image.. (B) It is located next to the colorful stairs.. (C) It is placed on top of the old building.. (D) There is no connection..
gold_answer: It is located next to the colorful stairs
